ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Continued To Jan-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Timothy Watson to appear on January 29, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Status Report has not been filed. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

Petition For Dertermination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution.
Off Calendar Jun-21-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Watson for and with Maria Olivares and for Carmen Olivares (Co-Executors).

The Court stated that there does not appear to be any opposition and granted the Petition For Determination of Entitlement to Estate Distribution (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Andrade.

Off the record. Status on filing of petition for final distribution or petition for approval of status report was continued to December 11, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Probate Examiner will notify Counsel.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Jun-18-2012 Continued To Dec-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Apr-18-2012 Continued To Jun-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Apr-04-2012 Continued To Apr-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Julia Chan for Carmen Olivares and Maria Olivares (Petitioners).

Counsel reported that there are ambiguities in the Will and she will be filing a Petition to Determine Heirship. The matter was continued to April 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
